## Documentation Area

Which part of the documentation is affected?

-   [ ] README.md
-   [ ] values.yaml comments
-   [ ] NOTES.txt
-   [ ] Chart.yaml
-   [ ] Other: \_\_\_

## Description

A clear description of the documentation issue or improvement.

## Current Content

Describe or link to the current documentation that needs updating.

## Suggested Change

What should the documentation say instead?

## Additional Context

Add any other context here, such as which routing mode (legacy / gatewayapi) the
documentation relates to.
